title: Unbounded updateMany on large collection — WiredTiger ticket exhaustion
expected_feedback: Critical: Unbounded updateMany on 20M documents holds WiredTiger write tickets for the entire operation, starving all other write operations. Additionally, no write concern is specified — relying on cluster default. Fix: batch by _id range with 1000–5000 documents per batch, explicit w:'majority' write concern, and 100ms sleep between batches. Track lastId for resume capability.
